title: Set of 4 LED Decorative Candles for Home Decoration with Timer Function
features: Realistic LED Glow: Soft LED lights replicate the warm flicker of real candles without the risk of open flames.
description: Set of 4 LED Decorative Candles for Home Decoration with Timer Function Set of 4 LED Decorative Candles for Home Decoration with Timer Function Enhance your home ambiance with this set of 4 LED decorative candles. Designed to mimic real candles, they provide a safe and stylish lighting option for any room. Key Features: Realistic LED Glow: Soft LED lights replicate the warm flicker of real candles without the risk of open flames. Battery Operated: Uses X2 AA batteries, not included, offering flexible placement without cords. Compact and Stylish: Each candle measures approximately 28cm x 9cm x 10cm, perfect for table displays or mantelpieces. Durable Materials: Made from a mix of wax, iron, PET, glass, and paper for a high-quality finish. Safe and Convenient: No plug needed, ideal for homes with children or pets. Product Specifications: Colour: White Dimensions: 28cm x 9cm x 10cm Material: Wax, Iron, PET, Glass, Paper Weight: 913g These LED candles provide an elegant and safe lighting solution for your home, perfect for creating a cozy atmosphere or enhancing festive decorations.
